A max rank Fast Deflection will increase a Warframe's per-second shield recharge rate from 15 + 5% of max shields to 28.5 + 9.5% of max shields.
Shield regeneration delay reduction is capped at -80%.

Can be combined with Fortitude for +190% shield recharge and -45% shield recharge delay, Vigilante Vigor for +150% shield recharge and -75% shield recharge delay, or both for a total of +250% shield recharge and -75% shield recharge delay.
Fast Deflection is useful on Frames with a low health pool and thin armor rating, like Volt , Hildryn , Mag , Gyre or Caliban who rely heavily on shields to avoid damage.
Reduces the time for the natural shield recharge that brings back the full effectiveness of Shield Gating .

Gauss gains shield recharge and reduced shield recharge delay scaling with his Battery; adding Fast Deflection reduces the threshold at which -75% shield recharge delay is reached and makes his shield charge much more quickly, making him very hard to kill especially in tandem with Arcane Aegis .
